examples: The benefit is that one can build up the theory of correctness provable compiler easily.
There is now a direct, provable link between an organization's flexibility and business performance.
My money is on B2B software that installs easily and shows a provable return on investment in a year or less.
Meanwhile, the non-provable claim by the advocates of Obamanomics, that the increased spending saved jobs, is belied by what has happened since the policy was stopped.
